text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Takarazuka Kinen. The crowd
cheers with even more enthusiasm than what was
exhibited during the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Determined to show her resolve, Mejiro McQueen
heads to her latest of many matches with Mejiro
Ryan.
